case_title: STUCKEY, HELEN vs. DOWELL, NANCY et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STUCKEY, HELEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOWELL, NANCY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 4012 24TH ST #2, LEASE FORFEITED
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $115.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF STUCKEY, HELEN AS TO DEFENDANT DOWELL, NANCY
DECLARATION RE UNAVAILABILITY FILED FILED BY PLAINTIFF STUCKEY, HELEN

AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $197.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF STUCKEY, HELEN AS TO DEFENDANT DOWELL, NANCY
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STUCKEY, HELEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOWELL, NANCY $3,556.96 RENT, $197.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,753.96
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STUCKEY, HELEN AS TO DEFENDANT DOWELL, NANCY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE DRV IS $18.34 FILED BY PLAINTIFF STUCKEY, HELEN
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT DOWELL, NANCY
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF STUCKEY, HELEN
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STUCKEY, HELEN SERVED NOV-05-1994, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOWELL, NANCY
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DOWELL, NANCY
